title: DarkMining
description: Get even more drops when mining blocks
body:
Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!


 

DarkMining


Vanilla Mining only gives 1 drop when you mine blocks. With DarkMining you now have a chance to receive even more items! Mine some ores to receive diamonds and emeralds or go treasure hunting in sand.. |  View Changelog

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG (for a full RPG experience, get the DarkRPG modpack and enjoy quests and rpg gameplay)

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features)

- Standard Vanilla blocks only drop 1 specific item when mined or broken. You now have a chance to receive some rare items when mining.

- Looking for some food? go searching in some dirt or netherrack

- Looking for Diamonds or Emeralds? go mine some ores and even get double your standard rewards!

- Looking for even more rare items? go mine some End Blocks

- Drops are based on weightage system. You are guaranteed the standard vanilla drops and have a chance to get the other items.

 

 

 

Permission - Feel free to use in your modpacks.

 

Click the banner below to get your server today! or go to BisectHosting.com  and make sure to use the code 'gamerpotion' to get your 25% off.
